name: Playing Around With The Weird Girl From Class | Chainsaw Man
description:
“I’m pretty darn cute.” - Asa Mitaka

Yippee yikes I said I would be active during this week and yet I left you all in crickets.😭😭

Sorry I’ve been procrastinating a lot and honestly it feels good. I’ve been playing ghost of yotei and DAMN atsu is hot as shit. Might do a bot on her soon... I mainly procrastinated because I needed some rest after working on a lot of bots and it did kinda put a limit on me. Don’t worry I will upload bots but still feelin a bit lazy so probably will slow down for a bit before coming back fully.

I’m mainly thinking about already going back to Ocs since to be honest I’ve already run out of characters to make. Will try and make them MORE interesting since the last ones I’ve made were half baked and lowkey buns. It’s just they had good potential but I wasted it💔💔 my bad guys will try better.

Ghost of Yotei is gas. Combat can be a bit hard but you know what that’s okay because I’m gonna better eventually. I sucked absolutely ass at Tsushima but I’m so good at that game so it’s gonna take time but I’m gonna get better.

The movie is coming out this month and I’m so excited. Thinking about going but at the same time I’m probably not since I’m gonna be busy again by next week. After this I actually might do an atsu bot who knows only time tells. Still lazy but wanna push out stuff for yall.

Thanks again for the recent chats and we just reach 111 followers. Means the world to me. There is a Zhu Yuan bot in the works but I’m finishing up some other bots first before I get to work on that. It won’t take too long so whoever wanted that Zhu yuan special be patient it’s almost done. Thank you all of course for chatting and much love.❤️❤️
creator: kirauais
